    • defaultEmbed

      public void defaultEmbed(Embed embed)
      从类复制的说明: Command
      Override to populate the embed builder after every non-throwing execution, including both success and error cases. Don't include sensitive info, there is no permission validation.
      覆盖:
      defaultEmbed 在类中 Command
